calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-19-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-19-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Peter Stanwyck, Esq. for Plaintiff: Duralee Multifabrics, Inc.
Order waiving live testimovy on default judgment prove-up hearing signed by Comm. Kaplan in open court.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Shades of Sarah as follows:
Damages $34,940.59
Costs $343.63
Judgment signed in open court.
